ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand originated */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the style is suitable (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fabrics" (
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric */,
  "fabric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fabric */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region where the fabric is sourced */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the fabric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fits" (
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit */,
  "fit_name" TEXT /* Name of the fit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fit */,
  "recommended_body_type" TEXT /* Body type best suited for the fit */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a size chart for the fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that manufactures the product */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style of the product */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric used in the product */,
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fit of the product */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "available_sizes" TEXT /* Sizes available for the product (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_fit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fit_id") REFERENCES fits ("fit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabrics ("fabric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse or store where the inventory is located */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* The threshold quantity below which a reorder is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, retailer, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been approved for display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method used for shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
